item.title: Vinyl set by Night Mover - DJs Alix Brown & James Matthew Seven 💿 Saturday, Apri...

@alix_brown

Vinyl set by Night Mover - DJs Alix Brown & James Matthew Seven 💿

Saturday, April 11th • 8PM

item.title: Fun times playing tunes at the legendary @schottnyc // @schottnyc.lastore with a...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@alix_brown

Fun times playing tunes at the legendary @schottnyc // @schottnyc.lastore with a special live performance from @guards pre @credo23 film festival 🎸

Thanks for my brand new Schott Perfecto, the Ramones leather jacket of choice.

@crystalcrossfilm screens this Friday, 8PM at American Legion Post 43 🎥

Next time I’ll play records!

📸 @ryanwinfieldking

Se slideshow på Instagram

@alix_brown

First gig of 2026 and it was a big one.
Opening for @duranduran at Viejas Arena 💥
Thank you @duranduran + @thekagency ❤️
